# Security Policy

## Supported versions

Security fixes are applied to the latest release on the `main` branch. Older
builds are not maintained.

## Reporting a vulnerability

If you discover a security vulnerability, please **do not** open a public issue.
Instead, report it privately to the maintainers via
[GitHub Security Advisories](https://docs.github.com/en/code-security/security-advisories/guidance-on-reporting-and-writing-information-about-vulnerabilities/privately-reporting-a-security-vulnerability).

Please include:

- A description of the vulnerability and its impact
- Steps to reproduce, or a proof of concept
- The affected Maven module (see the module list in the root `pom.xml`)

We aim to acknowledge reports within a few days and will keep you informed as we
work on a fix. Thank you for helping keep the project and its users safe.
